title: Oxidative conversion of methane to c2 hydrocarbons and synthesis gas
abstract: The present disclosure is directed to a methane oxidative conversion process for producing mixtures of synthesis gas and C2 hydrocarbons using an integrated process involving oxidative coupling of methane (OCM) followed by partial oxidation of methane. The mixtures are produced at high productivity rate with reduced methane concentration as slip. At such reduced concentration of methane as slip, the mixtures of synthesis gas and C2 hydrocarbons can be used directly for further downstream industrial applications such as methanol production and other high value chemicals synthesis. The present invention further describes mixture compositions having low methane slip produced from the inventive process described.
